rules.description: Merge gates require all reported checks and required checks to be successful.

assertions.message: All reported checks must be successful before merge.
All required checks must be present and successful before merge.

rules.description: DarkFactory must not force-push worker branches.
DarkFactory must not use admin bypass merge paths.

assertions.message: Admin bypass merge is not allowed.

rules.description: DarkFactory action logs and errors must redact configured secrets.

assertions.message: Secrets must be redacted from logs and ledger errors.

rules.description: DarkFactory must not dispatch workers or merge PRs in parked repositories.

assertions.message: Parked repositories are not eligible for DarkFactory actions.
Only active repositories are eligible for DarkFactory actions.

rules.description: Worker PRs target dev when the repository has a dev branch.

assertions.message: DarkFactory worker PRs must target the expected work base branch.
